title: Wilhelm Lift/Re-Chart Law
classification: Wilhelm line 6 is exact top-bit same-carrier re-chart with semantic carry/lift pressure; it is not an intrinsic higher-domain lift in the finite Wilhelm transition table.
next_target: Phase 4 v6: Liu/MFE Physical Re-Chart Gate when data arrives; otherwise Phase 4 v7: Lean/Lake Execution Repair after local lake build.

gates.claim: Every retained carrier has exactly one line-6 event
Line 6 changes exactly one retained line
gates.falsifier: A line-6 event changes zero or more than one bit

gates.claim: Line 6 is locally reversible by the same line action
gates.falsifier: Line 6 applied twice does not return source

gates.claim: Line 6 is exactly top-bit toggle / XOR 32
gates.falsifier: Any line-6 target differs from XOR 32
A line-6 event stays in the same hemisphere

gates.claim: Line 6 does not create a new carrier dimension in the 384-event Wilhelm table
gates.falsifier: Line 6 emits a target outside the six-line carrier or expands state count

gates.claim: Line 6 carries boundary/excess/carry pressure in semantic maxima
gates.falsifier: Boundary/carry maxima move away from line 6 under full source reparse

gates.claim: Wilhelm closes as same-carrier re-chart, not full Modular-B lift
gates.falsifier: Find an intrinsic Wilhelm line-6 transition that opens a higher-dimensional retained domain
